basic_details.short_information: National Council of Science Museums (NCSM) Consultant (Museum of Word) Notification 2026 has been released on 01 June 2026 on the official website of NCSM under Advertisement No. 11/2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NCSM Consultant (Museum of Word) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: 1st Class M.Sc or 1st Class B.E./B.Tech in Comp. Science/Mechanical/Electronics with 20 years’ relevant work experience
qualification.details: Museum professionals retired in Pay Matrix Level-14 or equivalent from Central Government/State Government/Autonomous Bodies/PSUs etc. having 1st Class M.Sc or 1st Class B.E./B.Tech in Comp. Science/Mechanical/Electronics with 20 years’ relevant work experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NCSM Consultant (Museum of Word) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NCSM Consultant post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NCSM Consultant (Museum of Word) post is 12th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 1st Class M.Sc or 1st Class B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science, Mechanical, or Electronics, along with 20 years of relevant work experience. Retired professionals from government bodies are also eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant position is 63 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules, which can be found in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 55,000/- per month for the Consultant (Museum of Word) position.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NCSM recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the NCSM Consultant post?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. Candidates must download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this NCSM vacancy?
faq.answer: The job is offered on a contractual basis for the Consultant (Museum of Word) position.

faq.question: Q8. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Council of Science Museums (NCSM).

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Consultant (Museum of Word).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section provided in this article. It is advisable to read it thoroughly before applying.
